data_description.region: Leave on Auto-detect unless you know your account is in a specific region.

data_description.ble_address: MAC of the robot's Bluetooth radio, used for local manual drive. Leave blank to auto-discover by name.
data_description.rtsp_path: LAN camera stream path. Leave blank for the default 640x480 stream (h264ESVideoTest); set a higher-resolution path here once known.
data_description.rtsp_port: TCP port of the robot's on-board RTSP server (default 10022).
